name: io.github.customblinds/cb-shop
title: Custom Blinds Shop
description: South Africa's first AI-transactable window covering catalogue. Search blinds, shutters and awnings, get live ZAR pricing by dimension, configure products with colour validation, submit enquiries, and create draft orders with Yoco payment links — direct from shop.customblinds.co.za.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token — only required for submit_enquiry and create_order. Catalogue, pricing and configuration tools are open.
